title.en: Table 1.4: Major and sub-major hypotheses and corresponding audit chapters

cells.major: Kshipra River has remained polluted even after multiple interventions of the State Agencies.
cells.submajor: 1. Untreated sewage of ULBs is merging in Kshipra River. (It includes six minor hypotheses.)
2. Inadequate treatment of Industrial waste. (It includes five minor hypotheses.)
3. Water Quality of Kshipra River and its tributaries had been adversely affected due to pollution at bank. (It includes three minor hypotheses.)

cells.major: The natural flow of water in Kshipra River has reduced due to improper management and over extraction of groundwater in Kshipra sub-basin.
cells.submajor: 4. Water flow in Kshipra River has reduced drastically. (It includes four minor hypotheses.)
5. Due to decreasing groundwater, flow of River is getting affected. (It includes four minor hypotheses.)
